title: apium laciniatum
intro: Apium laciniatum, also known as Australian celery or wild celery, is a perennial herb native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. It is used to treat various health issues, including urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and arthritis, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve kidney function. Apium laciniatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
